channel.description:
Specify the channel to trigger the notification: sms, email, or WhatsApp. Valid options are: `email`, `sms`, and `whatsapp`.

* `email` - Email
* `sms` - SMS
* `whatsapp` - WhatsApp

template_id.description: This field is required. It specifies the template to be used for the notification.

to.description: Required for all notifications. Must be a valid email address for email notifications, and a valid international phone number for SMS and WhatsApp notifications.

unit_config.description: This field is optional for SMS and email notifications, but it is mandatory for WhatsApp notifications.

language.description:
Specifies the language for email, SMS, and WhatsApp notifications. The default language is English (en).

* `en` - English
* `ar` - Arabic

cc.description: This field is optional. When provided, it specifies the list of CC recipients for the email notification.

bcc.description: This field is optional. When provided, it specifies the list of BCC recipients for the email notification.

subject.description: This field is optional. Use this field to customize the email subject if you don't want to use the one from the template.

body.description: {'This field is optional. If provided, it serves as a fallback template in case the primary template fails to render. This has to be a plain text body of the email.'}

context.description: This field is optional. If provided, the context data will be passed to the template engine during rendering.

attachments.description: This field is optional. Use this field to include file attachments with your email notification. Provide the file data as a base64 encoded string *or* a publicly accessible URL.

trace_id.description: This field is optional. A unique identifier for tracking the notification request. Useful for logging and debugging.

tags.description: This field is optional. A list of metadata tags for analytics or categorization purposes.

value.body: This plain text body serves as a fallback in the event of template rendering exceptions.
